title: Animals: Nestin-Cre::DIO-SPOTlight transgenic mouse line generation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2sibt","text":"This protocol describes the steps performed to generate Nestin-Cre::DIO-SPOTlight transgenic mouse line.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To produce the Rosa26-DIO-SPOTlight mouse clone the DIO-SPOTlight contruct into the Ai9 vector backbone in place of the Lox-STOP-Lox-tdTomato cassette.
Transfer the linearized Ai9-DIO-SPOTlight plasmid to an available transgenic mouse core (rodent genetic engineering services).
Integrate the the linearized Ai9-DIO-SPOTlight plasmid into the Rosa26 locus using homologous recombination and electroporate into hybrid 129S6/C57BL/6N (G4) embryonic stem cells.
To achieve pan-neuronal expression cross Rosa26-DIO-SPOTlight hemizygous transgenic founders with Nestin-Cre mice.
creator: Matt Oliver
